content_body: We had an awesome time. The cabin was beautiful and clean. We had everything we needed. We enjoyed the pavilion area the best, it was easy access to the river. We went trout fishing everyday and had a great time. The Toccoa River was clear and beautiful and great for fishing. Something unique about this cabin was the scenic railway that came by. We will be coming back!
title: Labor Day Weekend on the Toccoa River at A Rivers Bend
